CustomObject.description: Admin-configurable list of PermissionSet or PermissionSetGroup developer names that define the entitled-user denominator for FluentMetric AI adoption metrics. EntitlementService unions assignees of all enabled rows; missing names are dropped silently and an empty/all-fail list flips the dashboard to an "all active users" fallback denominator.
CustomObject.label: FluentMetric Entitlement Permission Set
